root.sql: select sum_share_amount as sum_shr_not_lon ,count_share as count_shr_not_lon ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(date_fr,'dd/mm/yyyy') as tdate_fr ,seq_no ,begin_condition ,end_condition ,count_member ,sum_share_stock ,sum_share_amount ,deposit_type ,rpt ,date_fr ,count_share ,count_loan_emer ,sum_loan_emer ,count_loan_norm ,sum_loan_norm ,count_loan_special ,sum_loan_special ,loan_balance from SC_REP_ANALYSE_SHARE where rpt = 'TEL065011063'
